rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single literature-reference mention in the introduction, where the authors say their findings on advanced TV "complement" Deng and Mela (2018). The citing paper does not build its identification, model, hypotheses, or empirical design on Deng and Mela, and it does not return to that study in results interpretation beyond this brief positioning statement. This indicates a background contextual citation rather than a meaningful directional dependence.
